title: Rainbow Polka Dots Party Paper Cups (9oz) Pack of 8 - Vibrant, Fun and Eco-Friendly Drinkware for Kids and Adults
features: PARTY-PERFECT PAPER CUPS: Make a splash at your next gathering with our rainbow polka dots party paper cups, perfect for kids and adults alike! Add a vibrant and playful touch to any event, making every moment truly special.

RANBOW POLKA DOTS DESIGN: These fun and colorful paper cups feature a charming rainbow polka dots pattern, sure to brighten up any occasion and bring smiles to your guests' faces. Stand out from the crowd with this eye-catching drinkware.

CONVENIENT PACK OF 8: Each pack contains 8 high-quality, 9oz party paper cups, providing you the perfect quantity for small to medium-sized events. Keep the cups handy for effortless serving and hosting.

ECO-FRIENDLY & SAFE: Made from sustainable, recyclable materials, these party paper cups are an eco-conscious choice for all your celebrations. Minimize your environmental impact while enjoying guilt-free drinks in style.

MULTIPURPOSE & VERSATILE: Ideal for any festivity such as birthdays, baby showers, picnics, and more. These rainbow polka dots party paper cups can be used for both hot and cold beverages, making them a versatile option for every event.
description: From the manufacturer Coordinating Solid Colours Lime Green Ruby Red Sunflower Yellow Powder Blue Rainbow Polka Dots Birthday Add-On Items These beautiful designs are sure to WOW your guests when celebrating your Birthday!
